compiled_state.title: Migrate debug-everything and end-session Playwright references to CLI
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Update debug-everything and end-session skill files to reference @playwright/cli patterns:
1. debug-everything/SKILL.md — update Playwright dispatch references to use CLI commands
2. end-session/SKILL.md — update cleanup/state references (.playwright-mcp/ → .playwright-cli/)

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/skills/end-session/SKILL.md (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] debug-everything uses CLI dispatch patterns
  Verify: ! grep -q "playwright.*MCP\|browser_run_code\|browser_snapshot" plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md
- [ ] end-session references .playwright-cli/
  Verify: ! grep -q "playwright-mcp" plugins/dso/skills/end-session/SKILL.md
- [ ] All RED tests for skill files pass
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-cli-lifecycle-migration.sh 2>&1 | grep "test_debug_everything\|test_end_session" | grep -v "FAIL"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
